input.description: Get repo info and PR comments

input.command: gh pr view 36 --json reviews,comments --jq '.reviews[].body, .comments[].body' 2>&1; echo "---"; gh api repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/36/reviews 2>&1

content.content:
## Code Review

This pull request expands the Overseerr integration by adding tools for retrieving request details, deleting requests, and retrying failed requests. The implementation includes updates to the agent's tool dispatching logic, new input schemas, and extensions to the Overseerr client and its associated data types. I have no feedback to provide.

input.command: gh api repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/36/reviews --jq '.[] | select(.state != "COMMENTED") | "\(.user.login) (\(.state)): \(.body)"' 2>&1; echo "==="; gh api repos/{owner}/{repo}/issues/36/comments --jq '.[] | "\(.user.login): \(.body)"' 2>&1
